ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Cramer, via ZOOM, for Juan Reyes, Petitioner; Dean Christopherson, via ZOOM, for Maria Lee, Interested Party.

The court requests a status of the sale of the real property. Mr. Cramer reports that the listing price has been reduced by agreement of the four owners and hopes that it is sold soon so that distributions can be made. The court then confirms that the agreement between the owners to reduce the listing price was confirmed about two (2) weeks ago. The court then requests confirmation from Mr. Cramer regarding who Guadalupe is. Mr. Cramer reports that he cannot confirm who Guadalupe is but confirms that service has been effected on the four (4) beneficiaries listed on the notice of hearing filed with the court. The court confirms with Mr. Christopherson that he doesn't believe that his client is also known as Guadalupe.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Status Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
